JavaScript test scripts for undefined variables, null type checks, boolean assertions, string operations, number conversions, and prototype inheritance.

## Folders
- **[08.01](08.01/README.md)**: JavaScript test scripts for verifying behaviors related to undefined variables and properties.
- **[08.02](08.02/README.md)**: JavaScript test files for setting a variable to `null` and checking if its type is `'object'`.
- **[08.03](08.03/README.md)**: Test scripts for boolean variable assertions and comparisons.
- **[08.04](08.04/README.md)**: JavaScript string tests for type, comparison, constructor properties, indexing, and concatenation.
- **[08.05](08.05/README.md)**: Test scripts for hexadecimal to decimal conversion, type of negative infinity, and zero vs. negative infinity.
- **[08.12](08.12/README.md)**: Tests prototype inheritance in JavaScript objects by asserting a property value.
